articles.title: ‘Nine amazing years’: Jayson Tatum on his relationship with Jaylen Brown
articles.description:
"They tried to pin us against each other and say one guy shouldn't be here, but the truth is we had nine amazing years together."

The post ‘Nine amazing years’: Jayson Tatum on his relationship with Jaylen Brown appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum reflects on nine successful years with Jaylen Brown in Boston.
Tatum addresses rumors attempting to pit him against Brown during their tenure.
Their strong partnership has contributed to the Celtics' competitive success in the NBA.
